name: Vala-Fi
description: Financial knowledge graph — company relationships from SEC 10-K filings. A Bloomberg Terminal you can talk to.

tools.name: get_supply_chain
tools.description: N-hop supply chain traversal — find suppliers, customers, or both with SEC citations

tools.name: get_customers
tools.description: Get all known customers of a company from SEC 10-K filings

tools.name: get_competitors
tools.description: Get all known competitors of a company from SEC 10-K filings

tools.name: find_path
tools.description: Find the shortest path between any two companies in the knowledge graph

tools.name: get_exposure
tools.description: Supply chain concentration risk analysis — shared suppliers, sole-source dependencies

tools.name: get_sector_graph
tools.description: Full relationship subgraph for an entire sector (paid tier)

prompts.name: analyze_supply_chain
prompts.description: Deep-dive a company's full supply chain with risk analysis

prompts.name: compare_companies
prompts.description: Compare two companies — shared suppliers, paths, competitive overlap

prompts.name: due_diligence
prompts.description: Structured due diligence memo from SEC filing data

resources.description: List of all 11 sectors in the knowledge graph
API overview, endpoint URL, and free tier limits
